class.name: navflex_frontier_planner/CandidateFrontierPlanner
class.description: Detects frontier clusters and returns a short path to the selected candidate point.

class.name: navflex_frontier_planner/FrontierAStarPlanner
class.description: Selects a frontier candidate and plans an internal FAEL-style voxel/free-space A* path to it.
